Our Strategic Focus Areas

We optimize high-volume financial processes and establish data-driven decision algorithms.

account_balance Harezm's Flagship

SAP FI, CO & Material Ledger

We offer financial accounting, cost control, and actual costing within a unified structure.

FI — Financial Accounting

General Ledger (New GL)
Accounts Payable/Receivable (AP/AR)
Asset Accounting (AA)
Bank Accounting
Tax & e-Transformation

CO — Controlling

Cost Center Accounting
Internal Orders
Product Costing
Profitability Analysis (CO-PA)

Material Ledger

Actual Costing
Multi-Currency Valuation
Multi-Level Price Determination
Inventory Revaluation
